scripts.test:e2e:headed: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DISPLAY" ]; then playwright test --headed --grep-invert @live; elif command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then xvfb-run -a playwright test --headed --grep-invert @live; else playwright test --grep-invert @live; fi'
scripts.test:e2e:headed:live: sh -c 'if [ -n "$DISPLAY" ]; then playwright test --headed --grep @live; elif command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1; then xvfb-run -a playwright test --headed --grep @live; else playwright test --grep @live; fi'
